title: Is a 1-way connection between boards possible?
excerpt:

Then in my main board I would like to create a drop-down column which lets me select one of the items …

posts.author: rkaplan (Richard Kaplan)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to create a board which contains a set of Long Text items - essentially a database of possible answers.

Then in my main board I would like to create a drop-down column which lets me select one of the items in the “database.”

I believe this can be done by connecting the boards; however, I do not want to sync these. In other words, after I choose a drop-down selection, if I decide to edit it, I do not want that edit to flow back to the original “database” board.

Is this posible?

posts.author: Nir-Jetpack (Nir @ Jetpack Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
@rkaplan you can have Ia 1-way connection between monday.com boards using VLOOKUP - and by creating a repository board with a pre made answers (long text) and a status column that matches each answer.

Check out VLOOKUP here
Let me know if you have any question.
Nir
